summary: A superb high‑fidelity recording praised for its full, magnetic sonic range, though the musical performance details are not mentioned.
review: The reviewer rates this capture five stars, highlighting an exceptionally clear and dynamic sound that transports them back in time. No specific comments about the setlist or individual performances are provided, so the musical quality of the show remains unknown.
